title: Single Default Currency — No Multi-Currency Support (MVP)
description: The system shall operate exclusively in a single implicit default currency for the MVP. The system shall NOT provide currency selection, currency conversion, or exchange rate functionality. All monetary amounts are stored as plain numeric values without a currency code.
acceptance_criteria: No currency picker appears anywhere in the UI
The TransactionEntity and AccountEntity schemas have no currency_code column
All amounts are displayed with a single app-wide currency symbol configured at build time
